title: Villagers Rebalanced
description: Rebalances trades across multiple villager professions.
body:
[!["Minecraft Rebalanced" Collection by RainlessSky](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft%20Rebalanced-2A2B2F?style=flat-square&logo=modrinth&label=part%20of&labelColor=222329)](https://modrinth.com/collection/rWTOiG2z)
![Minecraft Rebalanced sees survival as a survival game, and less of a free sandbox.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jPZFRfGa/images/7ebd705feba2a30b4017405ac475012e475fdcd5.png)

**This datapack needs plenty of constructive feedback, whether it's positive, mixed, or negative. Please join the Discord server and share your thoughts or suggestions!**
****

Villagers Rebalanced rebalances trades for multiple villager professions using the new data-driven villager trades system introduced in 26.1. It primarily focuses on nerfing the most powerful trades, buffing underused trades, and adding a select few new, interesting trades.

## Changes

<details>
<summary>Changelist (spoilers!!!)</summary>
  
### Definitions

**Stock** - How many times players can use a specific trade until the next restock

**Reputation discount** - A multiplier for a trade's price based on factors like Hero of the Village, repeat customer discount, repeat customer price gouging, hurting a villager, etc...

**Stack count** - How many of the purchased item the player is given
****

- <details><summary>Librarian</summary>

  - Removed enchanted book trade from Novice level
  - Mending can no longer be obtained from librarian trades
  - Adjusted Enchanted Book trade:
    - Stock: 12 --> 4
    - Reputation discount: 20% --> 40%

- <details><summary>Fletcher</summary>

  - Adjusted Stick trade:
    - Stock: 12 --> 4
    - Reputation discount: 20% --> 40%

- <details><summary>Farmer</summary>

  - Added 8 emeralds + 1 gold ingot --> 1 golden apple at Master level
    - Stock: 4
    - Reputation discount: 25%
  - Adjusted Golden Carrot trade:
    - Stack count: 3 --> 2
    - Stock: 12 --> 8
    - Reputation discount: 5% --> 20%

- <details><summary>Toolsmith, Weaponsmith, and Armorer</summary>

  - Adjusted diamond equipment trades
    - Equipment no longer has any pre-applied enchantments
    - Stock: 3 --> 1
    - Reputation discount: 20% --> 50%

- <details><summary>Butcher</summary>

  - <details><summary>Level 1</summary>

    - Raw Chicken --> Emerald
      - Required raw chicken: 14 --> 1
      - Stock: 16 --> 8
      - Reputation discount: 5% --> 15%
    - Raw Porkchop --> Emerald
      - Required raw porkchops: 7 --> 2
      - Stock: 16 --> 8
      - Reputation discount: 5% --> 15%
      - XP: 2.0 --> 3.0
    - Raw Rabbit --> Emerald
      - Required raw rabbit: 4 --> 1
      - Stock: 16 --> 6
      - Reputation discount: 5% --> 10%
      - XP: 2.0 --> 5.0
  - <details><summary>Level 2</summary>

    - Coal --> Emerald
      - Required coal: 15 --> 16
      - Reputation discount: 5% --> 10%
      - XP: 2.0 --> 20.0
    - Emerald --> Cooked Chicken
      - Stack count: 8 --> 6
      - Stock: 16 --> 12
      - Reputation discount: 5% --> 10%
      - XP: 5.0 --> 4.0
    - Emerald --> Cooked Porkchop
      - Count: 5 --> 4
      - Stock: 16 --> 12
      - Reputation discount: 5% --> 10%
      - Price (emeralds): 1 --> 2
      - XP: 5.0 --> 2.0
  - <details><summary>Level 3</summary>

    - Raw Beef --> Emerald
      - Required raw beef: 10 --> 4
      - Stock: 16 --> 12
      - Reputation discount: 5% --> 15%
      - XP: 20.0 --> 10.0
    - Raw Mutton --> Emerald
      - Required raw mutton: 7 --> 4
      - Reputation discount: 5% --> 10%
      - XP: 20.0 --> 12.0
  - Level 4 (empty)
  - <details><summary>Level 5</summary>

      - Addition: butcher trade Emerald --> Steak
        - Stack count: 4
        - Stock: 16
        - Reputation discount: 10%
        - Price (emeralds): 1
        - XP: 15.0
</details>
